implementation_summary: Implemented FeedFilterChips component with horizontal scrolling, category counts, and active state styling

AC-1.description: FeedFilterChips with categories displays chips with counts (e.g., 'All (42)')
AC-1.evidence: Component renders chips with label and count: `{label} ({count})`. Tests verify CATEGORY_LABELS and count display.

AC-2.description: User taps inactive chip fires onCategoryChange with new category
AC-2.evidence: Pressable component calls `onCategoryChange(category)` on press. Tests verify onCategoryChange prop and onPress handler.

AC-3.description: Active chip has distinct visual style
AC-3.evidence: Active chip uses `colors.primary` background and border, `colors.primaryForeground` text. Inactive uses transparent background with `colors.border`. Storybook stories show all active states.

AC-4.description: User taps active chip filter remains active (no toggle off)
AC-4.evidence: Pressable always calls `onCategoryChange(category)` without conditional logic. No toggle-off behavior implemented.

AC-5.description: Category with zero items shows count of 0 but remains tappable
AC-5.evidence: Component displays `{count}` without conditional logic. No `disabled` prop on Pressable. Zero-count story verifies behavior.

modular_design_analysis.reuse_decision: Created new component following spec pattern rather than reusing FilterChip due to different styling approach (theme tokens vs Tailwind classes)
patterns_reused: Theme token usage from useTheme hook
